mapper.sql: select uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.receive_type, uc.status, uc.order_id, uc.start_time, uc.end_time, uc.use_time, uc.create_time, u.nickname, u.phone, c.coupon_id as c_coupon_id, c.coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.min_amount, c.discount_value, c.use_type from t_user_coupon uc left join t_user u on u.user_id = uc.user_id left join t_coupon c on c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from t_user_coupon where user_id=#{userId} and coupon_id=#{couponId}
mapper.update: update t_user_coupon set status=#{status}, order_id=#{orderId}, use_time=sysdate() where user_coupon_id=#{userCouponId}
